title: Patch Notes & Updates
description: Official Ubisoft update and patch-note feed for all current and past season changes, balance adjustments, and content drops.

title: Seasonal Intel Source
description: Official Ubisoft hub for The Division 2 information, seasonal updates, expansions, media, and announcements.

title: Status & Server Health
description: Check live server status and maintenance windows for The Division 2 on all platforms — PC, PS5, Xbox Series.

title: Known Issues Board
description: Official Trello board tracking current Division 2 bugs, issues, workarounds, and status updates directly from the dev team.

title: Ubisoft Support
description: Account, platform, rewards, connectivity, and troubleshooting help for The Division 2. Report bugs and track open tickets here.

title: Division 2 Twitter / X
description: Follow @TheDivisionGame on X (Twitter) for real-time announcements, maintenance windows, event reminders, and community highlights.

title: Logos, Key Art & DLC Art
description: Massive Entertainment press resource for official logos, key art, DLC artwork, promotional imagery, and media assets.

title: Massive Entertainment
description: The studio behind The Division franchise. Press assets, career openings, studio news, and official communications from Massive.
